title: August 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 4''' is the 216th day of the year (217th in leap years), with 149 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Martin Jarvis]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Ian Liston]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Kristoffer Tabori]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Matt Forbeck]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Stuart Beattie]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Classic Star Wars 1|''Classic Star Wars'' 1]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 2|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Blood and Honor]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 67|''Republic'' 67]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic 2: Threat of Peace, Part 2]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Kanan's Jedi Training]]'' published.
*2015 – [[The Ewoks Join the Fight (storybook)|''The Ewoks Join the Fight'']] reissued as ''[[Ewoks Join the Fight]]''.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Poe Dameron: Free Fall]]'' published.
*2020 – [[Poe Dameron: Free Fall (audiobook)|''Poe Dameron: Free Fall'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 15|''Bounty Hunters'' 15]] published.
*2021 – [[War of the Bounty Hunters – 4-LOM & Zuckuss 1|''War of the Bounty Hunters – 4-LOM & Zuckuss'' 1]] published.
*[[2026]]– ''[[Star Wars Insider: The High Republic: Survivors of the Stormwall]]'' to be reprinted in paperback.
